Stage A: OQ-59-FLOOD-COG-CRS-LABEL-VS-COORDS resolved. Diagnosed SFINCS netCDF CRS encoding: `ds["crs"]` data variable carries attrs={"EPSG":"-", "epsg_code":"EPSG:32617"}; ds.attrs has no "crs" key, so the original `.attrs.get("crs", "EPSG:3857")` always returned EPSG:3857 (Web Mercator tag on UTM-17N coords → ~10,000 km misplacement in any GIS that respects the tag). Added `_read_crs_from_dataset(ds)` helper reading CF-convention encodings in order: epsg_code (handles "EPSG:32617" string AND bare int forms) → crs_wkt/spatial_ref via pyproj WKT parse → ds.attrs.get("crs") fallback with warning. BEFORE EPSG:3857; AFTER EPSG:32617. 3 new tests + OQ-58 squeeze guard preserved. 169/170 agent suite (1 pre-existing failure unrelated, from concurrent job-0060 mid-flight).
